## Target

Describe the repository, template, or documentation area being reviewed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Ownership boundaries are clear.
- [ ] Public/private repository boundary is documented.
- [ ] Rollback or recovery expectations are documented.
- [ ] Quality gates are documented.
- [ ] Security gates are documented.
- [ ] No real sensitive values are present.
